fewShots.question: Which sites have the most idle vehicles?
fewShots.query: MATCH (v:Vehicle)-[:located_at]->(s:RentalSite) WHERE v.Status = 'idle' RETURN s.SiteName, COUNT(v) AS IdleVehicles ORDER BY IdleVehicles DESC

fewShots.question: What are the top one-way flows between sites?
fewShots.query: MATCH (start:RentalSite)<-[:picked_up_at]-(r:Rental)-[:returned_at]->(end:RentalSite) WHERE start <> end RETURN start.SiteName AS PickupSite, end.SiteName AS ReturnSite, COUNT(r) AS Trips ORDER BY Trips DESC

fewShots.question: Show all vehicles currently at the Seattle Downtown site
fewShots.query: MATCH (v:Vehicle)-[:located_at]->(s:RentalSite) WHERE s.SiteName = 'Seattle Downtown' RETURN v.VIN, v.Make, v.Model, v.Status
